title:
Centre for Data Ethics and Innovation
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Centre for Data Ethics and Innovation
- About the Centre The Centre for Data Ethics and Innovation is a small team within the function of the Government Chief Data Steward (GCDS).
The Centre for Data Ethics and Innovation is a small team within the function of the Government Chief Data Steward (GCDS).
- Guidance It can be difficult to navigate the numerous guidance tools, frameworks, and principles out there. Here, we have outlined the key guidance in Aotearoa, how they may best apply to your project and direct you to the practical tools for each guidance. Data Protection and Use Policy This guidance is a good option for anyone who works directly with service users or communities. The Privacy, Human Rights and Ethics (PHRaE) Framework This guidance is a good option if privacy is the number one priority for your product, service, system or process. Ngā Tikanga Paihere This guidance is a good option if you want Te Ao Māori principles to inform your data practice. It is also a good framework for thinking about working with communities, and ensuring your data practices occur in good faith. Artificial Intelligence Guidance We’ve seen a lot of interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) over the last year, especially generative AI. Here are some good pieces of AI guidance you may like to consider for your project. Information Sharing Resource Hub This guidance is a good option for anyone who needs to share information regularly, especially personal information. Māori Data and AI – guidance for business
It can be difficult to navigate the numerous guidance tools, frameworks, and principles out there. Here, we have outlined the key guidance in Aotearoa, how they may best apply to your project and direct you to the practical tools for each guidance.
- Data Protection and Use Policy This guidance is a good option for anyone who works directly with service users or communities.

#### Data Protection and Use Policy
This guidance is a good option for anyone who works directly with service users or communities.
- The Privacy, Human Rights and Ethics (PHRaE) Framework This guidance is a good option if privacy is the number one priority for your product, service, system or process.

#### The Privacy, Human Rights and Ethics (PHRaE) Framework
This guidance is a good option if privacy is the number one priority for your product, service, system or process.
- Ngā Tikanga Paihere This guidance is a good option if you want Te Ao Māori principles to inform your data practice. It is also a good framework for thinking about working with communities, and ensuring your data practices occur in good faith.
This guidance is a good option if you want Te Ao Māori principles to inform your data practice. It is also a good framework for thinking about working with communities, and ensuring your data practices occur in good faith.
- Artificial Intelligence Guidance We’ve seen a lot of interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) over the last year, especially generative AI. Here are some good pieces of AI guidance you may like to consider for your project.

#### Artificial Intelligence Guidance
We’ve seen a lot of interest in Artificial Intelligence (AI) over the last year, especially generative AI. Here are some good pieces of AI guidance you may like to consider for your project.
- Information Sharing Resource Hub This guidance is a good option for anyone who needs to share information regularly, especially personal information.

#### Information Sharing Resource Hub
This guidance is a good option for anyone who needs to share information regularly, especially personal information.
- Māori Data and AI – guidance for business

#### Māori Data and AI – guidance for business
- Ethics training While the Centre doesn’t provide ethics training courses, there are several data ethics courses targeting various analytical functions.
While the Centre doesn’t provide ethics training courses, there are several data ethics courses targeting various analytical functions.
